differential_diagnoses: Rhabdomyolysis secondary to severe systemic infection
Autoimmune myositis (e.g., antisynthetase syndrome) with interstitial lung disease
next_steps: Order bedside urinalysis for myoglobin and microscopic evaluation for heme granular casts
Obtain infectious disease consultation for specialized testing (e.g., Leptospira PCR, blood cultures for atypical pathogens)
Consult nephrology for urgent management of acute kidney injury and potential renal replacement therapy
Continue broad-spectrum empiric antibiotic coverage with atypical coverage (e.g., levofloxacin)
Monitor CK levels, electrolytes, and acid-base status serially
Obtain autoimmune myositis panel and further history regarding environmental exposures in the apartment
